next_steps: Measurement of serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM)
Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay for CGD
Genetic testing for CYBB or other CGD-related gene mutations
Detailed evaluation for specific antibody deficiencies (pneumococcal titers)
Repeat liver biopsy with dedicated tissue for specialized PCR and culture (16S rRNA gene sequencing)
Specialized infectious disease consultation to discuss repeat imaging-guided biopsy specifically for molecular pathogen identification
